mapper.select: SELECT LOWER(t.status) AS status, COUNT(1) AS total FROM ticket t WHERE t.deleted = 0 AND LOWER(t.status) NOT IN ('completed', 'closed', 'rejected') GROUP BY LOWER(t.status)

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ticket t WHERE t.deleted = 0 AND LOWER(t.status) IN ('completed', 'closed') AND (t.closed_at >= #{startTime} AND t.closed_at < #{endTime} OR t.resolved_at >= #{startTime} AND t.resolved_at < #{endTime})

SELECT t.id, t.ticket_no AS ticketNo, t.title, LOWER(t.status) AS status, t.priority, u.name AS assigneeName, c.name AS categoryName, bti.severity_level AS severityLevel, t.create_time AS createTime, t.update_time AS updateTime FROM ticket t LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON t.assignee_id = u.id AND u.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN ticket_category c ON t.category_id = c.id AND c.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN ticket_bug_test_info bti ON bti.ticket_id = t.id AND bti.deleted = 0 WHERE t.deleted = 0 AND LOWER(t.status) = #{status} ORDER BY t.priority DESC, t.create_time ASC

SELECT t.id, t.ticket_no AS ticketNo, t.title, LOWER(t.status) AS status, t.priority, u.name AS assigneeName, c.name AS categoryName, bti.severity_level AS severityLevel, t.create_time AS createTime, t.update_time AS updateTime FROM ticket t LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON t.assignee_id = u.id AND u.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN ticket_category c ON t.category_id = c.id AND c.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN ticket_bug_test_info bti ON bti.ticket_id = t.id AND bti.deleted = 0 WHERE t.deleted = 0 AND LOWER(t.status) = 'suspended' ORDER BY t.priority DESC, t.create_time ASC

SELECT t.id, t.ticket_no AS ticketNo, t.title, LOWER(t.status) AS status, t.priority, u.name AS assigneeName, c.name AS categoryName, bti.severity_level AS severityLevel, t.create_time AS createTime, t.update_time AS updateTime FROM ticket t LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON t.assignee_id = u.id AND u.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN ticket_category c ON t.category_id = c.id AND c.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN ticket_bug_test_info bti ON bti.ticket_id = t.id AND bti.deleted = 0 WHERE t.deleted = 0 AND LOWER(t.status) IN ('processing', 'developing') ORDER BY t.priority DESC, t.create_time ASC

SELECT t.id, t.ticket_no AS ticketNo, t.title, LOWER(t.status) AS status, t.priority, u.name AS assigneeName, c.name AS categoryName, bti.severity_level AS severityLevel, t.create_time AS createTime, t.update_time AS updateTime FROM ticket t LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON t.assignee_id = u.id AND u.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN ticket_category c ON t.category_id = c.id AND c.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN ticket_bug_test_info bti ON bti.ticket_id = t.id AND bti.deleted = 0 WHERE t.deleted = 0 AND LOWER(t.status) = 'pending_verify' AND (t.workflow_id IS NULL OR t.workflow_id != 3) ORDER BY t.priority DESC, t.create_time ASC

SELECT t.id, t.ticket_no AS ticketNo, t.title, LOWER(t.status) AS status, t.priority, u.name AS assigneeName, c.name AS categoryName, bti.severity_level AS severityLevel, t.create_time AS createTime, t.update_time AS updateTime FROM ticket t LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON t.assignee_id = u.id AND u.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN ticket_category c ON t.category_id = c.id AND c.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN ticket_bug_test_info bti ON bti.ticket_id = t.id AND bti.deleted = 0 WHERE t.deleted = 0 AND LOWER(t.status) = 'temp_resolved' ORDER BY t.priority DESC, t.create_time ASC

SELECT COALESCE(bti.severity_level, '未分级') AS status, COUNT(1) AS total FROM ticket t LEFT JOIN ticket_bug_test_info bti ON bti.ticket_id = t.id AND bti.deleted = 0 WHERE t.deleted = 0 AND LOWER(t.status) IN ('completed', 'closed') AND (t.closed_at >= #{startTime} AND t.closed_at < #{endTime} OR t.resolved_at >= #{startTime} AND t.resolved_at < #{endTime}) GROUP BY bti.severity_level

SELECT COALESCE(bti.severity_level, '未分级') AS status, COUNT(1) AS total FROM ticket t LEFT JOIN ticket_bug_test_info bti ON bti.ticket_id = t.id AND bti.deleted = 0 WHERE t.deleted = 0 AND LOWER(t.status) NOT IN ('completed', 'closed', 'rejected') GROUP BY bti.severity_level

SELECT CASE WHEN bti.id IS NOT NULL THEN '缺陷' ELSE '非缺陷' END AS status, COUNT(1) AS total FROM ticket t LEFT JOIN ticket_bug_test_info bti ON bti.ticket_id = t.id AND bti.deleted = 0 WHERE t.deleted = 0 AND LOWER(t.status) IN ('completed', 'closed') AND (t.closed_at >= #{startTime} AND t.closed_at < #{endTime} OR t.resolved_at >= #{startTime} AND t.resolved_at < #{endTime}) GROUP BY CASE WHEN bti.id IS NOT NULL THEN '缺陷' ELSE '非缺陷' END
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ticket t WHERE t.deleted = 0
